title: MrOptituber
description: Optimization and YouTuber Mods: This mod will help you get more FPS and also adds mods used by YouTubers, such as Zoomify, texture packs, etc. You can make your own videos or experiment with mods that YouTubers use.
body:
Optimization and YouTuber Mods: This mod will help you get more FPS and also adds mods used by YouTubers, such as Zoomify, texture packs utiles, day count, etc. You can make your own videos or experiment with mods that YouTubers use.

It can also provide server optimization, but only on the client side.

We added many YouTubers mods and you won't experience lag because it's optimized.

This modpack combines with the optimization mod I also made: https://modrinth.com/modpack/mr.optimizer-legend-edition

This mod pack is designed to let you play Minecraft with mods that YouTubers use, such as zoom, free camera, a day counter, and texture packs, etc., to make it look great, just like a YouTuber would.

The texture packs were obtained from here: https://vanillatweaks.net/

But if you're worried about lag, don't be. We've also added many optimization mods like Sodium and Lithium, which are excellent for increasing FPS. With this mod, if you're a Minecraft YouTuber, you can use it for your videos, and even if you're not, you can enjoy a great Minecraft experience playing like one.

It includes many mods used by YouTubers as well as optimization mods.

[texture pack 1 "was where it was made"](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

[texture pack 2 "the one with the tools"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-weapons-and-tools/version/2.0.0)
